# Hash-pinned lock for the REPRODUCIBLE BUILD (R1-R10/P10). Generated from the
# proven build/.venv freeze of requirements-build.txt (runtime + PyInstaller),
# fully pinned with SHA-256 hashes so build.ps1 installs the exact, verified tree.
#
#   Platform:  Windows + CPython 3.11 ONLY (the build + CI target — windows-latest,
#              Python 3.11). The pins/hashes are Windows-wheel-specific; regenerate
#              this file per-platform if the build target ever changes.
#   Consumed:  build.ps1 installs with `pip install --require-hashes -r` and then
#              verifies the resulting environment matches this lock exactly
#              (build/check_build_env.py). version.py PLAYWRIGHT_VERSION is asserted
#              against the playwright pin here + in requirements.txt.
#   Includes:  the existing `cryptography` transitive (pulled by pdfminer.six) is
#              pinned here for lock integrity — NOT a new dependency.
#
#   Regenerate (after editing requirements*.txt / bumping a pin), from a clean
#   build/.venv on Windows + Python 3.11:
#       python -m venv .lockgen && .lockgen\Scripts\pip install pip-tools
#       build\.venv\Scripts\python -m pip freeze > _freeze.in
#       .lockgen\Scripts\python -m piptools compile --generate-hashes \
#           --allow-unsafe --no-header --no-annotate \
#           --output-file requirements-build.lock.txt _freeze.in
#
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — regenerate as above so the hashes stay correct.
